title: Call for in-kind sponsorship for British Embassy reception
body: "We would like to invite companies to contribute value-in-kind products for the reception, where their products will be featured and promoted, particularly in the following categories:    British dairy & cheese products   British seafood products   Jams/preserves    The reception will be held on the evening of March 9th. Any company wishing to register an expression of interest for sponsorship should make contact with the Embassy as below by 17:00 JST on Friday 30 January 2026.  In-kind sponsorship: katrine.sasaki@fcdo.gov.uk "
